---
title: "Hakkımda"
sidebar: false 
---

# ![](images/clipboard-2336795905.png){width="178"}

# Eğitim

-   B.S., Gazi University, Turkey, 2016 - 2020.
-   M.S., Industrial Engineering, Hacettepe University, Turkey, 2025 - ongoing.

# İş Tecrübesi

## Employements

1.  TASECS Enviromental INC., Expert Specialty Engineering Engineer, 2023-ongoing
2.  FNSS Defense Systems INC. ,Product Safety Engineer, 02.2022-11.2023

## Internships

1.  ASELSAN INC., System Engineering Intern, 2020
2.  MAN Truck and Bus INC., Technical Training Intern, 2019
3.  Toyota Plaza Toyan, Technical Intern, 2017

# Projects

1.  ELECTRIC VEHICLE MODELLING and SIMULATION PROJECT with MATLAB/SIMULINK
2.  INTERNAL COMBUSTION ENGINE DESIGN AND ANALYSIS
3.  AUDI A4 3D SURFACE DESIGN

# Competencies

Catia, Simulink, R, Quarto, Git

# Hobbies

Kitap okumak, Yağlı boya tablosu yapmak
